choices: Fatty liver disease from other causes

questions.q: Alcoholic cardiomyopathy is a serious heart condition caused by prolonged heavy alcohol consumption. What does this condition primarily damage?
choices: The heart muscle's ability to pump blood effectively

choices: It filters toxins from the blood
It produces insulin to control blood glucose levels

choices: Being injured in a car accident caused by an intoxicated driver
Experiencing secondhand smoke while someone drinks
Feeling peer pressure to consume alcohol
Witnessing someone's embarrassing behavior while drunk
